recommendations.title: Luckiest Girl Alive
recommendations.overview: A successful woman in New York City finds her life upended when she is forced to confront a dark truth that threatens to unravel her meticulously crafted life.

recommendations.title: The Neighbor
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man in a stagnant marriage, finds his life upended when an attractive young woman and her seemingly abusive husband move in next door.

recommendations.title: The Central Park Five
recommendations.overview: In 1989, five black and Latino teenagers from Harlem were arrested and later convicted of raping a white woman in New York City's Central Park. They spent between 6 and 13 years in prison before a serial rapist confessed that he alone had committed t
recommendations.director: David McMahon, Ken Burns, Sarah Burns

recommendations.title: The Strays
recommendations.overview: A Black woman's meticulously crafted life of privilege starts to unravel when two strangers show up in her quaint suburban town.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Nanny
recommendations.overview: Aisha, a Senegalese immigrant who takes a job as a nanny for a wealthy white family in New York City, finds herself consumed by unsettling visions and a growing rage.

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: The Watermelon Woman
recommendations.overview: A young black lesbian filmmaker probes into the life of The Watermelon Woman, a 1930s black actress who played 'mammy' archetypes.

recommendations.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
recommendations.overview: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

recommendations.title: They Look Like People
recommendations.overview: Suspecting that people are transforming into malevolent shape-shifters, Wyatt flees to New York City to seek out his estranged childhood friend Christian.
